# t0lkim.dev

> Mike Lott — Cybersecurity & Operational Engineering

## About the Author

I build things.

## Projects

- [TeenTidal](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/teentidal/): Native iOS parental content filter for Tidal with two-layer explicit content filtering. Built in Swift.
- [pg-harden](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/pg-harden/): PostgreSQL security hardening scanner checking SCRAM auth, SSL, and pg_hba. Built in Rust.
- [TidalPlaylistBuilder](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/tidal-playlist-builder/): Build Tidal playlists from BBC programmes, CSV, and text files. Built in Rust.
- [TheStreamDeck](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/the-stream-deck/): Raspberry Pi streaming audio appliance with touchscreen, VU meters, and 4-source switching.
- [PatronVault](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/patron-vault/): Patreon media archival tool using cookie-based auth against JSON:API. Built in Rust.
- [CourseVault](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/course-vault/): Teachable course archival tool with browser cookie extraction. Built in Go.
- [MultiMediaManager](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/multi-media-manager/): Image/video organiser with deduplication and EXIF-based renaming. Built in Rust.
- [session-manager](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/session-manager/): LLM-agnostic session orchestrator with entity-tag overlap, conflict detection, and relevance-filtered context injection. Built in Rust.
- [FretNote](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/fretnote/): Guitar note-learning app with real-time YIN pitch detection, gamified drilling, and post-session analytics. Built in Swift for iPadOS/iOS.
